items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the expiration tracking for certifications, specifically whether the system correctly identifies expired certifications. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the expiration status of certifications, leading to an inconclusive status. The linked use case mentions the need for expiration tracking but lacks concrete evidence to confirm that this requirement was satisfied.
